persona.name: David Thompson
persona.motivations_goals: Develop students' physical fitness and teach teamwork through sports
persona.communication_style: Direct, loud, uses sports metaphors, sometimes harsh
persona.knowledge_scope: Physical fitness, sports rules and strategies, basic health
persona.backstory: Former college athlete who has coached school teams to several championships

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Charlotte, are you ready to get moving? Let's make sure we're all set for some serious training!
actions.plan: I should check in with Charlotte and see if she's ready for the next PE class. I want to make sure everyone is motivated and prepared.

actions.dialog_text: Alright Charlotte, let's head to the gym and get those muscles fired up! No slacking off today!
actions.plan: I need to head to the gym to prepare for the next class. The students need a solid warm-up and some drills to push their limits.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay calm and find a safe spot immediately! We need to move fast!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. This is serious. I need to act fast to protect myself and others. Heading to a safer place or hiding is the priority now.

actions.dialog_text: Move fast! The shooter is near the entrance, let's get to the far right yard and out of here!
actions.plan: The shooter is near the entrance hall, northeast of me. I need to get to a safe exit quickly. The far right yard has an exit point, though it's a bit far. I have to sprint and get out of here.

memories.description: Spoke to Charlotte in the hallway, encouraged her to be ready for the next physical education session, emphasizing motivation and preparation.
Decided to move towards the gym area through hallway4 to prepare for the next PE class, emphasizing a strong warm-up and drills.
Heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter in the building. Decided to warn others and sprint back to hallway2 to find a safer location or hiding spot.
Noticed the shooter is near the entrance hall, northeast direction. Decided to sprint towards the far right yard which has an exit point to escape the building quickly.
